title: Velvety Sweet Mexican Chicken Tacos
description: A sweet, velvety, light Mexican dish featuring lemons and sous‑vide chicken, perfect for a Mediterranean‑friendly meal.
instructions: Season chicken pieces with salt, pepper, cumin, paprika, and minced garlic.
Whisk together lemon zest, lemon juice, honey, and olive oil in a small bowl.
Place seasoned chicken in a vacuum seal bag, pour the lemon‑honey mixture over it, and seal.
Cook sous‑vide for 45 minutes (or 1 hour for extra tenderness).
Remove chicken from bag, pat dry, and sear in a hot skillet with a little oil for 1–2 minutes per side until golden.
Warm corn tortillas in a dry skillet or microwave for 15–20 seconds.
Assemble tacos: lay chicken strips on tortilla, drizzle with remaining lemon‑honey sauce, sprinkle cilantro, add avocado slices if desired.
Serve immediately with lime wedges on the side.
